REAL ESTATE PURCHASE AGREEMENT
Agreement Date: 2026-06-15
Buyer: Harborview Capital Partners LLC
Seller: Maple Ridge Office Owner LP
Property: 8200 West Park Avenue, Denver, CO 80221
Legal Description: Lot 4, Block 2, Maple Ridge Business Park, Adams County, Colorado
Purchase Price: $18,750,000
Earnest Money Deposit: $500,000
Scheduled Closing Date: 2026-09-30
Due Diligence Deadline: 2026-07-31
Financing Contingency: Yes
Inspection Contingency: Yes
Title Company/Escrow Agent: Front Range Title Company
Included Personal Property: lobby furniture; building maintenance equipment; security cameras
Special Conditions: seller to deliver tenant estoppels for 80% of leased area; seller to cure open roof permit before closing
Governing Law: Colorado
